reference: Hello! My doctor says I am having too much tension and I should relax more. He has given me Rinifol capsules, Medley O2H, and Zeegut capsules. In the past, I had a stone in my right kidney, though it was not that big. What does he mean? What are the capsules for? I could have asked him, but he won't tell me as I am not that old.
text: Hello, my doctor says I am having too much tension and I should relax more. He has given me Renaphole capsules, medically O2H, and Zebnic capsules. In the past I had a stone in my right kidney, though it was not that big. What does he need? What are the capsules for? I could have asked him, but he will tell me as I am not that old.
